focus: Use the operator-provided managed OpenSearch-compatible provider, create ignored local config, load the full public Cranfield corpus, and run live evaluation.
reason_started: The operator provided live OpenSearch credentials and explicitly instructed the project to use this provider instead of AWS/Amazon assumptions.
reason_ended: Live OpenSearch connectivity, cranfield-v0 load, live search, and live evaluation are verified; public acceptance remains blocked on Cloudflare deployment.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield -- --queries /private/tmp/retail-search-cranfield-live/queries.json --write experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-live.json --summary --concurrency 3
validators_executed.evidence: 225-query live evaluation produced MAP 0.2402, nDCG@10 0.2995, Precision@10 0.2316, Recall@10 0.3994, MRR 0.535.

validators_executed.name: live search sanity check
validators_executed.evidence: searchCranfield returned live Cranfield results for wing pressure distribution.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 14 tests passed and MDE artifacts parsed.

validators_skipped.name: public endpoint validation
validators_skipped.reason: Public Worker endpoints are not deployed yet.

github_submission.blocker: Changes remain in the working tree for review with secret local .env.local ignored; no explicit commit or push request was made.

reusable_lessons: Live evaluation against small managed OpenSearch providers should use bounded concurrency to avoid connection resets.
downstream_impacts: Retail Search is now blocked on Cloudflare deployment rather than OpenSearch provisioning.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can now include live OpenSearch baseline metrics.
evidence_quality_notes: OpenSearch evidence is live and uses the full public Cranfield corpus.
Public endpoint evidence remains absent until Cloudflare deployment.

supports_mission: Keeps OpenSearch as the production execution engine.
Uses full public Cranfield data rather than fixtures for live metrics.
Maintains explainable BM25 baseline without adding unearned architecture.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-003 directly advances Phase 1 foundation by converting OpenSearch from a blocker into live evidence.
